description: Marlinman calibration set 2, 2026-07-03 07:51-08:12 (WOS_BattleReports_Calibration2.pdf, 18 pages). All attacker troops T11 FC10. Families: hero layering (Rufus marksman-hero / Sonya lancer-hero / both) on 100 lancers vs Lv18 Roc; N=300-mixed repeat runs vs Lv25 Elk; marksman-wall test vs Lv25; buff ladder (10% attack item, then +7% atk / +6% def / +6% hp pet skills, cumulative - buffs cannot be removed once on). Baseline account bonuses as in beast_hunts_marlinman.json. own = [losses, injured, lightly, survivors].

hero_panel_injection.rule: A hero placed in a class slot injects additive points into the Stat Bonuses panel rows of THEIR OWN class only (their hero-card military stats). Other classes and all beast-side columns unchanged. Not present for vacant slots.
hero_panel_injection.both_heroes: both class rows boosted simultaneously, values identical to single-hero runs (no interaction)
hero_panel_injection.note: Atk/Def deltas identical within hero, Leth/HP independent - matches 4-stat hero military cards. Hero expedition SKILLS do not appear in the panel (Rufus runs: lancer/infantry rows exactly baseline).

buff_algebra.rule: Displayed panel = (1 + permanent) x (1 + sum of temporary buffs) - 1. Temporary buffs (buff items + pet skills) stack ADDITIVELY with each other inside one pool; the pool MULTIPLIES the permanent panel. Verified exact (<0.1 pct-point) on 12 independent class-stat readings.

hero_layering_100lancers_vs_Lv18.summary: incapacitated: none 12.2 avg | Rufus-only 8/7/7 | Sonya-only 1/1/0 | both 0/1/1. Rufus has NO marksman troops here, so his panel injection is inert - his ~40% casualty reduction must come from battle-time hero skills (S1 attack buff on all troops -> faster beast wipe -> shorter exposure). Sonya = panel injection on the actual troops + her skills -> near-zero casualties; 'both' saturates at Sonya's floor.

repeat_300mixed_vs_Lv25.note: Same fight as beast_ladder page 19 (3,692). All defeats, own [0,3,297,0]. Beast group losses show absorption: beast LANCER group takes 0 losses every run; beast INF group (front) takes most; beast MARKS group losses = our lancers' Ambusher bypass only.
repeat_300mixed_vs_Lv25.summary: 5-run set incl. original: 3692/4140/2961/3553/4390 - mean 3747, sd ~16%. Beast-side troop-skill procs now visible (right columns).

marksman_wall_600marks_400inf_vs_Lv25.summary: HEADLINE: 1,000 troops as 600 marks + 400 inf kill 25,926 vs 8,334 for 1,000 pure lancers (same beast) - protected marksmen ~3.1x lancer output. Beast INF group WIPED then absorption moved to beast LANCER group (11,036) while beast MARKS untouched (no bypass: we had no lancers) - receiving-side absorption order Inf->Lancer->Marks confirmed.

buff_ladder_300mixed_vs_Lv25.note: Cumulative buffs (cannot deactivate): run1 +10% attack item; run2 +7% attack pet; run3 +6% defense pet; run4 +6% health pet. Baseline-family mean 3,747.
buff_ladder_300mixed_vs_Lv25.summary: Attack +10% -> +17% output; attack +17% -> +36% output vs baseline mean (elasticity ~2, super-proportional = survival-time compounding; but within-run RNG sd 16%, so elasticity is 2 +/- ~1). Def/HP buffs add nothing measurable to OUTPUT here (own casualties pinned at 300 wipe; def/hp affect survival time -> weakly visible).

key_findings: BUFF ALGEBRA EXACT: panel = (1+permanent)(1+sum(buffs)) - 1; buff pool internally additive (10%+7%=17%), multiplicative vs permanent pool. 12/12 checks.
HERO PANEL INJECTION: hero-card military stats appear as additive pct-points in own-class panel rows; hero SKILLS never appear in the panel.
Sonya (own-class hero) removes ~95% of casualties vs Lv18; Rufus (off-class hero) still removes ~40% via battle-time skills alone.
Marksmen behind an infantry wall deal ~3.1x pure-lancer damage at equal N.

Beast lancer group NEVER takes losses while beast inf front stands; beast marks losses = our Ambusher bypass. Receiving-side absorption Inf->Lancer->Marks confirmed via beast inf wipe -> lancer erosion in p14.
Repeat variance at N=300: sd ~16% of mean (5 runs).
